hits.title: How I discovered my biggest customer pain point by accident
hits.body: I was building features nobody asked for. Then I started listening to support tickets and everything changed. The frustration was obvious once I looked at the data.

hits.title: Pivoting after realizing our initial market assumption was completely wrong
hits.body: We launched thinking designers would be our main users. Six months in, we discovered developers were actually struggling with the core problem. The pivot was brutal but necessary.

hits.title: The biggest complaint from our free trial users (and why we're building differently now)
hits.body: Onboarding was taking 30+ minutes. Users were getting frustrated before trying core features. We're redesigning the whole flow.
